summary: Packet 12 is still not UI-only because session setup/runtime do not yet support planner-count overrides or real multi-planner execution, so a repair packet is required before the SPA packet.
notes: Trackers were updated to insert repair packet 11D immediately after 11C and to make packet 12 depend on that repair. Secondary low-severity drift remains in README status prose, which still advertises the repo as only validated through packet 10.
